summary: Frontend-only E2E test for static portfolio SPA. Tested via Playwright against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. 52/53 functional assertions pass; the single 'fail' was a flawed test assumption (Ayoub Bnina is rendered split across two lines as 'Ayoub' + 'Bnina.' inside [data-testid=hero-name] — verified correct). No backend testing performed (no backend per spec).

spec_deviations.issue: data-testid for award cards is prefixed: 'award-awd-01', 'award-awd-02', 'award-awd-03', 'award-cert-01', 'award-cert-02', 'award-lead-01'. The review request listed bare ids ('awd-01', 'cert-01', etc.). Functionally OK — all 6 entries render with the IEEE RAS STM32F4 field commendation banner present — but the spec mismatch may break any external test relying on the bare ids.

verified_features: Hero renders 'Ayoub' + 'Bnina.' (split across two lines via profile.name.split) inside [data-testid=hero-name]; subtitle 'Embedded Robotics Engineer' present; boot terminal, stats grid, and radar visual ([data-testid=radar-visual]) all render.
All 8 sections present with correct ids and data-testids (hero/about/skills/experience/projects/education/awards/contact).
8 nav buttons present (nav-hero..nav-contact). nav-projects click smooth-scrolled to scrollY≈7530; hero-cta-contact scrolled to scrollY≈7862.
nav-toggle visible & functional on mobile (390x844) — opens vertical mobile nav (nav-mobile-* items).
Skills shows 4 categories + ribbon chips containing FreeRTOS, ThreadX, Micro-ROS, STM32H7, NXP, YOLOX.
Experience: experience-exp-01, experience-exp-02, experience-exp-03 all present.
Projects: TGT-001/002/003/004 visible with ONGOING / COMPLETED / ARCHIVE status badges.
Education: edu-01, edu-02, edu-03 all present.
Awards: 6 entries rendered (under prefixed testids award-awd-01/02/03, award-cert-01/02, award-lead-01) + 'IEEE RAS STM32F4' field commendation banner.

Contact form: empty submit shows sonner toast 'All required fields must be filled.'; valid submit shows success toast 'Mail client opened. Transmission ready to send.' (mailto: URL fires; URL not redirected because mailto opens external handler). No console errors during submit.
contact-copy-email writes 'bninayoub.pro@gmail.com' to clipboard and shows 'Copied:' toast.
HUD status bar UTC clock updates every second (HH:MM:SS pattern advances between consecutive reads).
0 console errors during full interaction flow. 0 failed network requests (no 4xx/5xx).
action_items: OPTIONAL/LOW: Either update review-request spec or rename award data-testids from 'award-{id}' to bare '{id}' (e.g., 'awd-01' instead of 'award-awd-01') to match the original spec.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean, well-structured, no DRY violations or async issues — pure static SPA.
No environment-variable issues — no backend interaction means REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is unused, which is correct for a static GitHub Pages target.
All interactive elements carry data-testid as required.
Contact.jsx uses window.location.href = mailto:... which is correct; submission handler validates required fields before invoking and shows appropriate toast.
seed_data_creation: None — all content is hardcoded in /app/frontend/src/data/portfolio.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static SPA portfolio. No backend. All testids confirmed working except awards which use 'award-{id}' prefix instead of bare ids. Mailto interception in headless Playwright is blocked by browser security on window.location.href setter — verify via post-submit success toast text 'Mail client opened. Transmission ready to send.' instead.
